# Welcome to Currie Motors Car & Van Rental

At Currie Motors Car & Van Rental, we bring you reliable and affordable vehicle hire with a professional and friendly service you can trust. With over 50 years of experience in the UK automotive industry, we are proud to have built a reputation as “Nice People to Do Business With.” Whether you're looking for car hire, van rental, or a people carrier for a family trip, we’ve got the perfect vehicle for whatever your needs may be.

[Find Out More](https://curriecarhire.co.uk/about-currie-motors/about-us)

![Welcome to Currie Motors Car & Van Rental](https://curriecarhire.co.uk/uploads/content-and-image/xs/nice-people-to-do-business.webp)

![Loyalty Scheme](https://curriecarhire.co.uk/uploads/alternating-content-areas/xs/currie-car-hire-loyalty-scheme.webp)

The more the merrier, so find the perfect vehicle for when you need more than five seats! With added space, fantastic luggage room, and the latest in convenience and technology, find the ideal vehicle to carry up to 9 people in comfort.

#### [Vans](https://curriecarhire.co.uk/vehicle-hire/vans)

Whatever the job, we have the van for it! Whether its moving house, transporting something bulky, or just one of those jobs that isn’t suitable for your personal car, we’ll get the job done!

### Reasons to Hire With us

With an extensive range of the latest models, with any combination of comfort, style, space, fuel-efficiency and all-round convenience, find the perfect car for any journey, any time, anywhere!

Low Rates, payment on arrival.

Low excess and zero deposit options.

Excellent Range of Cars, Vans and 7-9 Seaters including Self-Charging Hybrid vehicles.

We accept most licenses from around the world.

Outstanding 5-star service.

### Why choose Currie Motors?

We pride ourselves on delivering exceptional service to every customer, no matter your requirements. Our vehicles are maintained to the highest standards, ensuring safety and reliability every step of the way. From helping you choose the right vehicle to assisting with bookings, our experienced team is here to provide you with a 5 star rental service.

[Contact Us Today](https://curriecarhire.co.uk/contact-us)

![Why choose Currie Motors?](https://curriecarhire.co.uk/uploads/background-content/xs/need-an-affordable-and.webp)

### FAQs

#### Your Questions Answered

Discover more about what we offer and how.

[View all our FAQs](https://curriecarhire.co.uk/information/car-and-van-hire-faqs)

![faqs background image](https://curriecarhire.co.uk/uploads/faq-image/xs/67c8412cd3679.webp)

What types of vehicles are available for hire?

We offer a wide range of vehicles for hire, including vans and cars to suit your specific needs. Our selection ranges from compact cars for city trips to spacious vans for moving or transporting goods.

How far in advance should I make a reservation?

To secure your preferred vehicle and ensure availability, we recommend making a reservation as early as possible. Reserving at least a few weeks ahead of your desired rental period is generally a good idea, especially during peak travel seasons.

Can I modify or cancel my reservation?

We recommend contacting our Reservations team as soon as possible if you need to make changes to your booking. Some changes may incur fees, especially if made close to the rental pick-up date.

How do I make a reservation for a van or car rental?

Making a reservation is easy! You can book a van or car rental through our website by our booking form. Alternatively, you can also call our Reservations team on 01992 667681, and they will be happy to assist you with the booking process.

Do you accept international licences?

Yes, we accept international driving licenses. If you have a valid international driving license, you can rent a van or car from us, please get in contact with us today so we can help advise you on the requirements needed.

Can I book a van or car hire today?

Yes, absolutely! We offer the option to book a van or car hire on the same day, subject to availability. You can contact our Reservations team on 01992 667681.
